content: The full test suite is hanging — likely a test waiting on a database/network connection that doesn't exist in this worktree environment. Do NOT keep waiting for it. Instead: 1) Kill the hanging pytest process if running, 2) Mark the test step as complete with a note that full suite requires running services, 3) Run ONLY the unit tests you created for this task (test_health.py), 4) If those pass, proceed to Step 4 and finish the task.
